grades.label: Market Position

grades.label: Moat Type & Strength
grades.evidence: Wide moat via CUDA ecosystem lock-in. Developers, researchers, and academic curricula are CUDA-trained. Switching costs accumulating.

grades.label: Market Quality
grades.evidence: Gaming durable; emerging mentions of deep learning, professional visualisation, automotive compute. Multiple optionality vectors visible.

grades.label: Leadership Quality
grades.evidence: Jen-Hsun Huang co-founder, CEO since 1993. Long-term capital allocation track record; gross margin trending up; high R&D conviction.
